workplan: Standardize all Firestore booking documents to consistent format
decisions_made: All bookings use same field structure
trace_log always included in booking document
status always lowercase confirmed not CONFIRMED
errors_encountered: Old booking BK2026051710151566D0 had different format with base_service_fee and platform_fee
New bookings had correct format but were created automatically without user confirmation
outcome: Booking document format standardized. Old test documents identified for cleanup.
